ab: kiya imu i Kiway quw?
en: A: Is Kiway home?

ab: kiya, patgiy imu ga.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: kiya imu i Lawa’ quw?
en: A: Is Lawa' at home?

ab: ukas wala, kiya a waw su’ quw?
ch: B:她不在耶，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She's not here. What can I do for you?

ab: i ima’?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: utas, Tawyu’ kuwing, gawah cu balihun.
en: A: Grandfather, I am Tawyu', please open the door.

ab: ima’ su’?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Bawtu’, Maya’ kuwing, muwah kuwing kumiyum isu’.
en: A: Bawtu', I'm Maya', I've come to see you.

ab: ingasuw ta’ cubalay ini’ pakitaal la.
en: A: It's been a long time since we last met.

ab: uwal wala! lungulungun mi su’ cubalay, nabibuwiy uwah ga, maskakaruay ta’.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let's chat!

ab: tahunak, nubuwag cu cha han.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea first.

ab: mahuway su’!
en: A:Thank you.

ab: ca! nubuwag cu cha.
en: B: Come! Please have some tea.

ab: waw! balayq cubalay nubuwn ku cha mamu.
en: A:Wow! Your tea is delicious.

ab: ca ga! maniqay ta’ cu uquuqu’.
en: B: Come on! Let's eat fruit!

ab: uwal, talan ga kiiy cubalay balayq ku uquuqu’ ka hani.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: Ahoy! These fruits look great.

ab: sahahiya’ niqun ku uquuqu’ quw?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: uwal yu! sahahiya’ cubalay i niqun.
en: A:Yes, it's really delicious.

ab: manaqru’ tumahuk cu kakagabiyan i yaya’ la, nabuwibuwiy uwah i maneq ga.
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: uwal, mimaay kuwing cu qaba’ han.
en: A: Okay, I'll go wash my hands.

ab: kakaya i maneq, baliy ta’ cuquleq.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you're not an outsider.

ab: payux niqun mu la, matngi’ cubalay la.
en: A: I ate a lot, I'm full.

ab: kapayux tikay maneq, laxi ku mubaga’.
en: B: Eat more, don't be polite.

ab: uwal, sahahiya’ cubalay.
en: A:Well, it's delicious.

ab: mausa’ kuwing la, wahay mi su’ mitaal lawwiy i babaw niya’.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I'm leaving, I'll see you next time.

ab: uwal, masugagayay ta’ la.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: mahantan la, mausa’ kuwing imuwag la.
en: A: It's late, I'm going home.

ab: uwah lawwiy magunawu’ i babaw niya’ yu!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: nahiyahiyaw i humakay.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: uwal, kiya hreq na waw su’ ga uwah magunawu’ i imuwag mu.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
